transcripts.description: Phase 3 extractor polish planning: audit harness as step 1, corpus schema, tier tension diagnosis

labels.key_phrase: Audit harness first** (measurement before mutation)
labels.notes: Chose to build the audit harness before touching regex/LLM code — explicit rationale (can't iterate without a baseline). Semantic decision: no signal-phrase marker in or near this phrase.

labels.key_phrase: Without this, changes 2–4 are guesswork
labels.notes: Reusable heuristic: don't mutate extractor/ranker code without a measurement harness in place first. Semantic — no regex signal phrase.

labels.key_phrase: keyword tier is conservative, LLM tier is high-recall. Unresolved in code
labels.notes: Cross-cutting observation about tier tension in the extractor. Semantic — no 'realized/discovered/turns out' marker.

labels.key_phrase: zero** for `llm.go`, zero integration tests, no real-session recall measurement
labels.notes: Concrete quality-debt finding. No 'the fix was/root cause/lesson learned' signal — needs semantic reasoning to classify as a lesson.

labels.key_phrase: (a) + labeled JSON checked in at `testdata/audit/corpus.json`
labels.notes: Architectural choice for audit corpus location and format. No decision signal phrase.

labels.key_phrase: so I don't burn context reading JSONL
labels.notes: Heuristic: delegate large-file labeling to subagents. No pattern signal phrase.

labels.key_phrase: Sub-passes** — only if audit shows a specific kind
labels.notes: Deferred work contingent on audit. No 'come back to/TODO/we should' signal.

labels.key_phrase: Tiered `mm_search` fallback chain
labels.notes: Runner-up work explicitly deferred. No open-loop signal phrase — context is 'lean was X, runner-up is Y'.

labels.key_phrase: Dead zones: errors without
labels.notes: Regex coverage gap list. No lesson signal phrase — requires semantic classification.

transcripts.description: Phase 2 dogfooding session: wire all three scope roots, two load-bearing design reversals (auto-delete + forced-review), and rename .mm to .knowledge with tag-derived topic directories

labels.key_phrase: Root cause: `cmd/mastermind/main.go:runMCPServer` called `store.DefaultConfig()`
labels.notes: Signal 'root cause' (lesson list). The Phase 2 project-shared wiring bug surfaced by dogfooding mm_write — DefaultConfig never populated ProjectSharedRoot, so the MCP server could only see user-personal.

labels.key_phrase: load-bearing design decisions that turned out to be wrong once real use surfaced
labels.notes: Signal 'turned out to be' (lesson list). Meta-lesson: auto-delete + forced review for user-initiated writes were design decisions that failed on first contact with dogfooding.

labels.key_phrase: In six months with `.mm/` in 10 repos it's a painful migration
labels.notes: Signal 'painful' (war-story list). Framing the rename-now-vs-later cost — picked .knowledge over .mm before the migration cost compounds.

labels.key_phrase: Two tools writing to one dir with no coordination is a support nightmare
labels.notes: Signal 'nightmare' (war-story list). Insight driving the decision to NOT collocate ~/.claude/projects/<dir>/memory/ with Claude Code's own auto-memory.

labels.key_phrase: The framing question for this decision: *what happens when Jean clones mastermind on a second machine?*
labels.notes: Signal 'decision:' (decision list). Slug vs dash-encoded path for project-personal — chose slug (option b) for cross-machine continuity.

labels.key_phrase: the agent doesn't have ADHD
labels.notes: No canonical signal phrase adjacent. Pivotal reframe: ADHD constraint applies to the human actor, not the agent — unlocks the topic-directory design.

labels.key_phrase: auto-delete is the only irreversible failure
labels.notes: No canonical signal phrase adjacent. Severity framing that drove the PruneStale reversal — irreversible failures must not be a default.

labels.key_phrase: why am I making the user approve something they just asked for
labels.notes: No canonical signal phrase. Forcing question that surfaced the mm_write-to-live design reversal (user-initiated writes bypass pending).

labels.key_phrase: Option (b) — `project.Detect` slug.** Clearly the right call
labels.notes: Decision framing 'Clearly the right call' is not on the canonical list. Cross-machine continuity dictated slug over dash-encoded cwd path.

labels.key_phrase: first tag becomes the directory
labels.notes: No canonical signal phrase. The deterministic attractor rule for store-side topic resolution — agent provides tags, store derives directory.

labels.key_phrase: The directory structure is a **browsing layer**, not the retrieval layer
labels.notes: No canonical signal phrase. Architectural separation: directory tree is for humans, frontmatter+search is for machines — the two layers are independent.

labels.key_phrase: reserve a `MASTERMIND_PROJECT_DIR` env var for the rare case
labels.notes: No canonical open-loop signal phrase adjacent. Explicit YAGNI deferral for the slug-collision edge case (two unrelated projects normalizing to the same name).

labels.key_phrase: split the confusing `invalid or unconfigured scope` error in `store.Write` into two distinct messages
labels.notes: No canonical signal phrase adjacent. Post-bug polish decision: distinguish unknown-scope from known-scope-without-root, locked with an invariant test.
